resources.string: Al-HissN uses a local VPN to filter malicious domains directly on your device. Your network traffic is never sent to remote servers.
Al-HissN requires Accessibility permissions to scan your screen for phishing overlays and deceptive UI elements. All scanning is done locally, and no screen content is stored or transmitted.
The "Display over other apps" permission is used to show immediate warning banners if a malicious application opens.
Enables advanced uninstall protection to secure the Al-HissN application against unauthorized removal.
